title: The Cost of Cash
description: Demystifying Bitcoin and decentralised money for a mainstream audience. First formal public presentation at Sarawak's inaugural TEDx event, attended by government dignitaries.

title: Introducing Bitcoin: The Mostly Visual Guide
description: One of the earliest Bitcoin developer presentations in Southeast Asia. Multiple recorded sessions at WebCamp KL meetups.

title: Gold, Bitcoin, and Digital Sunnah Instruments
event: Islamic Finance News Forum, Kuala Lumpur
description: Blockchain applications in Islamic Finance — addressing institutional audiences on digital asset frameworks.

title: Blockchain in Financial Crime Prevention
description: Blockchain applications in financial crime prevention and compliance.

title: Banking on the Future of Blockchains
description: Addressing institutional adoption of blockchain infrastructure for financial services. 80-slide deck with embedded SlideShare.

title: Regional FinTech Leadership
description: Presenting on blockchain infrastructure for financial services at a regional FinTech leadership forum.

title: Introduction to Blockchains / Unblocking the Mystery
description: Two live radio appearances on Malaysia's English business radio explaining blockchain to mainstream business audiences.

title: Blockchain Infrastructure for Developers
description: Developer and institutional audiences on blockchain infrastructure. Recorded talk demonstrating the BlockStrap SDK.

title: StartingBlock European Tour
description: Blockchain developer workshop materials authored for a 6-city European tour (Istanbul, Amsterdam, Barcelona, Prague, Berlin, London). Over 100 developer hack-pack USB drives distributed.
